chunks.text: \chapter{Reference Books} \setcounter{mpfootnote}{0} \setcounter{footnote}{0} \label{books} \index{references} \index{books} \index{UNIX\/\TM \space books} The following is a list of UNIX\/\TM \space and other books that are commonly used. All of t

and other books that are commonly used. All of these books are available on loan from the campus libraries,\footnote{Type ``telnet melvyl.berkeley.edu'' to access the campus libraries' on-line book catalog.} or can be purchased at local bookstores

catalog.} or can be purchased at local bookstores or from The Computer Literacy Bookstore at (408)~730-9955. We do not endorse or recommend any of these texts in particular: \begin{enumerate} \item {\it UNIX\/\TM For People}. Peter Birns, Patrick B

{\it UNIX\/\TM For People}. Peter Birns, Patrick Brown, and John Muster. Englewood Cliffs, NJ: Prentice-Hall. \item {\it UNIX\/\TM Made Easy}. Lurnix Staff. Berkeley,CA: Osborne-McGraw Hill. \item {\it The UNIX\/\TM \space Programming Environment}. B

t The UNIX\/\TM \space Programming Environment}. Brian Kernighan and Rob Pike. Englewood Cliffs, NJ: Prentice-Hall. \item {\it The UNIX\/\TM \space C-Shell Field Guide}. Gail Anderson and Paul Anderson. Englewood Cliffs, NJ: Prentice-Hall. \item{\it

on. Englewood Cliffs, NJ: Prentice-Hall. \item{\it UNIX\/\TM \space Power Tools}. Jerry Peek, Tim O'Reilly, Mike Loukides, et al. Sebastopol, CA: O'Reilly \& Associates, Inc. \item{\it X Window System User's Guide -- Volume Three of the X Window Syst

User's Guide -- Volume Three of the X Window System Series}. Valerie Quercia and Tim O'Reilly. Sebastopol, CA: O'Reilly \& Associates, Inc. \item{\it A Practical Guide to the UNIX\/\TM \space System}. Mark G. Sobell. Redwood City, CA: Benjamin Cumm

}. Mark G. Sobell. Redwood City, CA: Benjamin Cummings Publishing Company, Inc. \end{enumerate} For more advanced users, here are some other good titles: \begin{enumerate} \item{\it The Design and Implementation of the 4.3BSD UNIX Operating Syste

Implementation of the 4.3BSD UNIX Operating System}. S.~Leffler, M.K. McKusick, M. Karels, and J. Quarterman. Reading, MA: Addison-Wesley Publishing Company. \item{\it The Design of the UNIX\/\TM Operating System}. Maurice Bach.Englewood Cliffs, NJ:
